Input
{
  "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t\t// Extract the segment match type from the flag's rules\n\t\tsegmentMatchType, err := extractSegmentMatchType(ctx, s.store, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, resp.SegmentKeys)\n\t\tif err == nil && segmentMatchType != \"\" {\n\t\t\tver.SegmentMatchType = segmentMatchType\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// extractSegmentMatchType extracts the segment match type (ALL or ANY) from the flag's rules\n// by finding the rule that matched the given segment keys\nfunc extractSegmentMatchType(ctx context.Context, store Storer, namespaceKey string, flagKey string, segmentKeys []string) (string, error) {\n\tif len(segmentKeys) == 0 {\n\t\treturn \"\", nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\t// Find the first rule that contains all the matched segments\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\t// Check if this rule contains all the matched segments\n\t\truleSegmentKeys := make(map[string]bool)\n\t\tfor k := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\truleSegmentKeys[k] = true\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tallSegmentsInRule := true\n\t\tfor _, sk := range segmentKeys {\n\t\t\tif !ruleSegmentKeys[sk] {\n\t\t\t\tallSegmentsInRule = false\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif allSegmentsInRule {\n\t\t\t// Found the matching rule, return its operator\n\t\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\treturn \"ANY\", nil\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\treturn \"ALL\", nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \"\", nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go"
}
Output
{
  "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t\t// Extract the segment match type from the flag's rules\n\t\tsegmentMatchType, err := extractSegmentMatchType(ctx, s.store, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, resp.SegmentKeys)\n\t\tif err == nil && segmentMatchType != \"\" {\n\t\t\tver.SegmentMatchType = segmentMatchType\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// extractSegmentMatchType extracts the segment match type (ALL or ANY) from the flag's rules\n// by finding the rule that matched the given segment keys\nfunc extractSegmentMatchType(ctx context.Context, store Storer, namespaceKey string, flagKey string, segmentKeys []string) (string, error) {\n\tif len(segmentKeys) == 0 {\n\t\treturn \"\", nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\t// Find the first rule that contains all the matched segments\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\t// Check if this rule contains all the matched segments\n\t\truleSegmentKeys := make(map[string]bool)\n\t\tfor k := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\truleSegmentKeys[k] = true\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tallSegmentsInRule := true\n\t\tfor _, sk := range segmentKeys {\n\t\t\tif !ruleSegmentKeys[sk] {\n\t\t\t\tallSegmentsInRule = false\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif allSegmentsInRule {\n\t\t\t// Found the matching rule, return its operator\n\t\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\treturn \"ANY\", nil\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\treturn \"ALL\", nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \"\", nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

  "originalFile": "syntax = \"proto3\";\n\npackage flipt.evaluation;\n\nimport \"google/protobuf/timestamp.proto\";\nimport \"google/api/annotations.proto\";\nimport \"google/api/visibility.proto\";\nimport \"google/api/field_behavior.proto\";\nimport \"gnostic/openapi/v3/annotations.proto\";\n\noption go_package = \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\";\n\nmessage EvaluationRequest {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  string namespace_key = 2 [(google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];\n  string flag_key = 3 [(google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];\n  string entity_id = 4 [(google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];\n  map<string, string> context = 5 [(google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];\n  string reference = 6;\n}\n\nmessage BatchEvaluationRequest {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationRequest requests = 3 [(google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];\n  string reference = 4;\n}\n\nmessage BatchEvaluationResponse {\n  string request_id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationResponse responses = 2;\n  double request_duration_millis = 3;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationReason {\n    UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;\n    FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;\n    MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON = 2;\n    DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON = 3;\n}\n\nenum ErrorEvaluationReason {\n  UNKNOWN_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;\n  NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationResponseType {\n  VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 0;\n  BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 1;\n  ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationResponse {\n    EvaluationResponseType type = 1;\n    oneof response {\n        BooleanEvaluationResponse boolean_response = 2;\n        VariantEvaluationResponse variant_response = 3;\n        ErrorEvaluationResponse error_response = 4;\n    }\n}\n\nmessage BooleanEvaluationResponse {\n  bool enabled = 1;\n  EvaluationReason reason = 2;\n  string request_id = 3;\n  double request_duration_millis = 4;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 5;\n  string flag_key = 6;\n  repeated string segment_keys = 7;\n}\n\nmessage VariantEvaluationResponse {\n  bool match = 1;\n  repeated string segment_keys = 2;\n  EvaluationReason reason = 3;\n  string variant_key = 4;\n  string variant_attachment = 5;\n  string request_id = 6;\n  double request_duration_millis = 7;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 8;\n  string flag_key = 9;\n}\n\nmessage ErrorEvaluationResponse {\n  string flag_key = 1;\n  string namespace_key = 2;\n  ErrorEvaluationReason reason = 3;\n}\n\nservice EvaluationService {\n  rpc Boolean(EvaluationRequest) returns (BooleanEvaluationResponse) {\n    option (google.api.http) = {post: \"/evaluate/v1/boolean\" body: \"*\"};\n    option (gnostic.openapi.v3.operation) = {operation_id: \"evaluateBoolean\"};\n  }\n  rpc Variant(EvaluationRequest) returns (VariantEvaluationResponse) {\n    option (google.api.http) = {post: \"/evaluate/v1/variant\" body: \"*\"};\n    option (gnostic.openapi.v3.operation) = {operation_id: \"evaluateVariant\"};\n  }\n  rpc Batch(BatchEvaluationRequest) returns (BatchEvaluationResponse) {\n    option (google.api.http) = {post: \"/evaluate/v1/batch\" body: \"*\"};\n    option (gnostic.openapi.v3.operation) = {operation_id: \"evaluateBatch\"};\n  }\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationDistribution {\n  string id = 1;\n  string rule_id = 2;\n  string variant_id = 3;\n  string variant_key = 4;\n  string variant_attachment = 5;\n  float rollout = 6;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationRolloutType {\n  UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 0;\n  SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 1;\n  THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRollout {\n  EvaluationRolloutType type = 1;\n  int32 rank = 2;\n  oneof rule {\n    EvaluationRolloutSegment segment = 3;\n    EvaluationRolloutThreshold threshold = 4;\n  }\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRolloutThreshold {\n  float percentage = 1;\n  bool value = 2;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationSegmentOperator {\n  OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR = 0;\n  AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRolloutSegment {\n  bool value = 1;\n  EvaluationSegmentOperator segment_operator = 2;\n  repeated EvaluationSegment segments = 3;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\n  ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE = 0;\n  ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationSegment {\n  string key = 1;\n  string name = 2;\n  string description = 3;\n  EvaluationSegmentMatchType match_type = 4;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp created_at = 5;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp updated_at = 6;\n  repeated EvaluationConstraint constraints = 7;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationVariant {\n  string id = 1;\n  string key = 2;\n  string attachment = 3;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationFlagType {\n  VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE = 0;\n  BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationFlag {\n  string key = 1;\n  string name = 2;\n  string description = 3;\n  bool enabled = 4;\n  EvaluationFlagType type = 5;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp created_at = 6;\n  google.protobuf.Timestamp updated_at = 7;\n  repeated EvaluationRule rules = 8;\n  repeated EvaluationRollout rollouts = 9;\n  optional EvaluationVariant default_variant = 10;\n}\n\nenum EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\n  UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 0;\n  STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 1;\n  NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 2;\n  BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 3;\n  DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 4;\n  ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationConstraint {\n  string id = 1;\n  EvaluationConstraintComparisonType type = 2;\n  string property = 3;\n  string operator = 4;\n  string value = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationRule {\n  string id = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationSegment segments = 2;\n  int32 rank = 3;\n  EvaluationSegmentOperator segment_operator = 4;\n  repeated EvaluationDistribution distributions = 5;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespace {\n  string key = 1;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot {\n  EvaluationNamespace namespace = 1;\n  repeated EvaluationFlag flags = 2;\n}\n\nmessage EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest {\n  string key = 1;\n  string reference = 2;\n}\n\nservice DataService {\n  option (google.api.api_visibility) = {restriction: \"flipt:sdk:ignore\"};\n\n  rpc EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) returns (EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot);\n}\n",

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "func (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go",
    "numLines": 35,
    "startLine": 60,
    "totalLines": 322
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",

116. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go",
  "new_string": "\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// extractSegmentMatchType extracts the segment match type (ALL or ANY) from the flag's rules\n// by finding the rule that matched the given segment keys\nfunc extractSegmentMatchType(ctx context.Context, store Storer, namespaceKey string, flagKey string, segmentKeys []string) (string, error) {\n\tif len(segmentKeys) == 0 {\n\t\treturn \"\", nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\t// Find the first rule that contains all the matched segments\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\t// Check if this rule contains all the matched segments\n\t\truleSegmentKeys := make(map[string]bool)\n\t\tfor k := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\truleSegmentKeys[k] = true\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tallSegmentsInRule := true\n\t\tfor _, sk := range segmentKeys {\n\t\t\tif !ruleSegmentKeys[sk] {\n\t\t\t\tallSegmentsInRule = false\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif allSegmentsInRule {\n\t\t\t// Found the matching rule, return its operator\n\t\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\treturn \"ANY\", nil\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\treturn \"ALL\", nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \"\", nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.",
  "old_string": "\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go",
  "newString": "\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// extractSegmentMatchType extracts the segment match type (ALL or ANY) from the flag's rules\n// by finding the rule that matched the given segment keys\nfunc extractSegmentMatchType(ctx context.Context, store Storer, namespaceKey string, flagKey string, segmentKeys []string) (string, error) {\n\tif len(segmentKeys) == 0 {\n\t\treturn \"\", nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\t// Find the first rule that contains all the matched segments\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\t// Check if this rule contains all the matched segments\n\t\truleSegmentKeys := make(map[string]bool)\n\t\tfor k := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\truleSegmentKeys[k] = true\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tallSegmentsInRule := true\n\t\tfor _, sk := range segmentKeys {\n\t\t\tif !ruleSegmentKeys[sk] {\n\t\t\t\tallSegmentsInRule = false\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif allSegmentsInRule {\n\t\t\t// Found the matching rule, return its operator\n\t\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\treturn \"ANY\", nil\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\treturn \"ALL\", nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \"\", nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.",
  "oldString": "\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.",
  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t\t// Extract the segment match type from the flag's rules\n\t\tsegmentMatchType, err := extractSegmentMatchType(ctx, s.store, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, resp.SegmentKeys)\n\t\tif err == nil && segmentMatchType != \"\" {\n\t\t\tver.SegmentMatchType = segmentMatchType\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   return ver, nil",
        " }",
        " ",
        "+// extractSegmentMatchType extracts the segment match type (ALL or ANY) from the flag's rules",
        "+// by finding the rule that matched the given segment keys",
        "+func extractSegmentMatchType(ctx context.Context, store Storer, namespaceKey string, flagKey string, segmentKeys []string) (string, error) {",
        "+  if len(segmentKeys) == 0 {",
        "+    return \"\", nil",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  rules, err := store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))",
        "+  if err != nil {",
        "+    return \"\", err",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  // Find the first rule that contains all the matched segments",
        "+  for _, rule := range rules {",
        "+    // Check if this rule contains all the matched segments",
        "+    ruleSegmentKeys := make(map[string]bool)",
        "+    for k := range rule.Segments {",
        "+      ruleSegmentKeys[k] = true",
        "+    }",
        "+",
        "+    allSegmentsInRule := true",
        "+    for _, sk := range segmentKeys {",
        "+      if !ruleSegmentKeys[sk] {",
        "+        allSegmentsInRule = false",
        "+        break",
        "+      }",
        "+    }",
        "+",
        "+    if allSegmentsInRule {",
        "+      // Found the matching rule, return its operator",
        "+      switch rule.SegmentOperator {",
        "+      case flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:",
        "+        return \"ANY\", nil",
        "+      case flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:",
        "+        return \"ALL\", nil",
        "+      }",
        "+      break",
        "+    }",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  return \"\", nil",
        "+}",
        "+",
        " // Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.",
        " func (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {",
        "   flag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))"
      ],
      "newLines": 49,
      "newStart": 97,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 97
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

1. WRITE /workspace/rpc/flipt/evaluation/evaluation.proto
syntax = "proto3";

package flipt.evaluation;

import "google/protobuf/timestamp.proto";

option go_package = "go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation";

message EvaluationRequest {
  string request_id = 1;
  string namespace_key = 2;
  string flag_key = 3;
  string entity_id = 4;
  map<string, string> context = 5;
  string reference = 6;
}

message BatchEvaluationRequest {
  string request_id = 1;
  repeated EvaluationRequest requests = 3;
  string reference = 4;
}

message BatchEvaluationResponse {
  string request_id = 1;
  repeated EvaluationResponse responses = 2;
  double request_duration_millis = 3;
}

enum EvaluationReason {
    UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;
    FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;
    MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON = 2;
    DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON = 3;
}

enum ErrorEvaluationReason {
  UNKNOWN_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 0;
  NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON = 1;
}

enum EvaluationResponseType {
  VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 0;
  BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 1;
  ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE = 2;
}

message EvaluationResponse {
    EvaluationResponseType type = 1;
    oneof response {
        BooleanEvaluationResponse boolean_response = 2;
        VariantEvaluationResponse variant_response = 3;
        ErrorEvaluationResponse error_response = 4;
    }
}

message BooleanEvaluationResponse {
  bool enabled = 1;
  EvaluationReason reason = 2;
  string request_id = 3;
  double request_duration_millis = 4;
  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 5;
  string flag_key = 6;
}

message VariantEvaluationResponse {
  bool match = 1;
  repeated string segment_keys = 2;
  EvaluationReason reason = 3;
  string variant_key = 4;
  string variant_attachment = 5;
  string request_id = 6;
  double request_duration_millis = 7;
  google.protobuf.Timestamp 
... (truncated)
2. WRITE /workspace/MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md
# Modifications to evaluation.pb.go

This document details all the changes needed to add the `segment_match_type` field to the `VariantEvaluationResponse` message type in the file `rpc/flipt/evaluation/evaluation.pb.go`.

## Overview

The modifications add a new field `SegmentMatchType` to the `VariantEvaluationResponse` struct, including:
1. A new struct field definition
2. A new getter method
3. Updated protobuf descriptor bytes to reflect the new field

## Modification 1: Add Field to VariantEvaluationResponse Struct

**Location:** Lines 819-833 (becomes 819-834)

**Original struct (lines 819-833):**
```go
type VariantEvaluationResponse struct {
	state         protoimpl.MessageState
	sizeCache     protoimpl.SizeCache
	unknownFields protoimpl.UnknownFields

	Match                 bool                   `protobuf:"varint,1,opt,name=match,proto3" json:"match,omitempty"`
	SegmentKeys           []string               `protobuf:"bytes,2,rep,name=segment_keys,json=segmentKeys,proto3" json:"segment_keys,omitempty"`
	Reason                EvaluationReason       `protobuf:"varint,3,opt,name=reason,proto3,enum=flipt.evaluation.EvaluationReason" json:"reason,omitempty"`
	VariantKey            string                 `protobuf:"bytes,4,opt,name=variant_key,json=variantKey,proto3" json:"variant_key,omitempty"`
	VariantAttachment     string                 `protobuf:"bytes,5,opt,name=variant_attachment,json=variantAttachment,proto3" json:"variant_attachment,omitempty"`
	RequestId             string                 `protobuf:"bytes,6,opt,name=request_id,json=requestId,proto3" json:"request_id,omitempty"`
	RequestDurationMillis float64                `protobuf:"fixed64,7,opt,name=request_duration_millis,json=requestDurationMillis,proto3" json:"request_duration_millis,omitempty"`
	Time
... (truncated)

5. WRITE /workspace/APPLICATION_GUIDE.md
# Application Guide for evaluation.pb.go Modifications

This guide provides step-by-step instructions for applying the three modifications to the file `/workspace/rpc/flipt/evaluation/evaluation.pb.go`.

---

## Overview

The modifications add support for a `segment_match_type` field to the `VariantEvaluationResponse` message in the Flipt evaluation protocol buffers.

**File:** `rpc/flipt/evaluation/evaluation.pb.go`
**Commits:** Applied to `github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f` (commit 3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8)
**Total Lines Added:** 12
**Total Lines Removed:** 0

---

## Change 1: Add Struct Field

### Location
**File:** `rpc/flipt/evaluation/evaluation.pb.go`
**Lines:** 833 (insert after line 832)

### Current Code (Before)
```go
type VariantEvaluationResponse struct {
	// ... (other fields) ...
	Timestamp             *timestamppb.Timestamp `protobuf:"bytes,8,opt,name=timestamp,proto3" json:"timestamp,omitempty"`
	FlagKey               string                 `protobuf:"bytes,9,opt,name=flag_key,json=flagKey,proto3" json:"flag_key,omitempty"`
}
```

### New Code (After)
```go
type VariantEvaluationResponse struct {
	// ... (other fields) ...
	Timestamp             *timestamppb.Timestamp `protobuf:"bytes,8,opt,name=timestamp,proto3" json:"timestamp,omitempty"`
	FlagKey               string                 `protobuf:"bytes,9,opt,name=flag_key,json=flagKey,proto3" json:"flag_key,omitempty"`
	SegmentMatchType      string                 `protobuf:"bytes,10,opt,name=segment_match_type,json=segmentMatchType,proto3" json:"segment_match_type,omitempty"`
}
```

### Instructions
1. Open the file at the location indicated above
2. Find the `FlagKey` field definition (line 832)
3. Position cursor at the end of line 832
4. Press Enter to create a new line
5. Copy an
... (truncated)
6. WRITE /workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go
package evaluation

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"fmt"
	"hash/crc32"
	"strconv"
	"time"

	errs "go.flipt.io/flipt/errors"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics"
	fliptotel "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
	rpcevaluation "go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace"
	"go.uber.org/zap"
)

// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.
// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.
func (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {
	flag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	s.logger.Debug("variant", zap.Stringer("request", r))

	resp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	spanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{
		fliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),
		fliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),
		fliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),
		fliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),
		fliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),
		fliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeProviderName,
		fliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),
	}

	// add otel attributes to span
	span := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)
	span.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)

	s.logger.Debug("variant", zap.Stringer("response", 
... (truncated)
7. EDIT /workspace/rpc/flipt/evaluation/evaluation.proto
Before
message VariantEvaluationResponse {
  bool match = 1;
  repeated string segment_keys = 2;
  EvaluationReason reason = 3;
  string variant_key = 4;
  string variant_attachment = 5;
  string request_id = 6;
  double request_duration_millis = 7;
  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 8;
  string flag_key = 9;
}
After
message VariantEvaluationResponse {
  bool match = 1;
  repeated string segment_keys = 2;
  EvaluationReason reason = 3;
  string variant_key = 4;
  string variant_attachment = 5;
  string request_id = 6;
  double request_duration_millis = 7;
  google.protobuf.Timestamp timestamp = 8;
  string flag_key = 9;
  string segment_match_type = 10;
}

Before
type VariantEvaluationResponse struct {
	state                 protoimpl.MessageState `protogen:"open.v1"`
	Match                 bool                   `protobuf:"varint,1,opt,name=match,proto3" json:"match,omitempty"`
	SegmentKeys           []string               `protobuf:"bytes,2,rep,name=segment_keys,json=segmentKeys,proto3" json:"segment_keys,omitempty"`
	Reason                EvaluationReason       `protobuf:"varint,3,opt,name=reason,proto3,enum=flipt.evaluation.EvaluationReason" json:"reason,omitempty"`
	VariantKey            string                 `protobuf:"bytes,4,opt,name=variant_key,json=variantKey,proto3" json:"variant_key,omitempty"`
	VariantAttachment     string                 `protobuf:"bytes,5,opt,name=variant_attachment,json=variantAttachment,proto3" json:"variant_attachment,omitempty"`
	RequestId             string                 `protobuf:"bytes,6,opt,name=request_id,json=requestId,proto3" json:"request_id,omitempty"`
	RequestDurationMillis float64                `protobuf:"fixed64,7,opt,name=request_duration_millis,json=requestDurationMillis,proto3" json:"request_duration_millis,omitempty"`
	Timestamp             *timestamppb.Timestamp `protobuf:"bytes,8,opt,name=timestamp,proto3" json:"timestamp,omitempty"`
	FlagKey               string                 `protobuf:"bytes,9,opt,name=flag_key,json=flagKey,proto3" json:"flag_key,omitempty"`
	unknownFields         protoimpl.UnknownFields
	sizeCache             protoimpl.SizeCache
}
After
type VariantEvaluationResponse struct {
	state                 protoimpl.MessageState `protogen:"open.v1"`
	Match                 bool                   `protobuf:"varint,1,opt,name=match,proto3" json:"match,omitempty"`
	SegmentKeys           []string               `protobuf:"bytes,2,rep,name=segment_keys,json=segmentKeys,proto3" json:"segment_keys,omitempty"`
	Reason                EvaluationReason       `protobuf:"varint,3,opt,name=reason,proto3,enum=flipt.evaluation.EvaluationReason" json:"reason,omitempty"`

12. EDIT /workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go

// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.
After
	return ver, nil
}

// extractSegmentMatchType extracts the segment match type (ALL or ANY) from the flag's rules
// by finding the rule that matched the given segment keys
func extractSegmentMatchType(ctx context.Context, store Storer, namespaceKey string, flagKey string, segmentKeys []string) (string, error) {
	if len(segmentKeys) == 0 {
		return "", nil
	}

	rules, err := store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	// Find the first rule that contains all the matched segments
	for _, rule := range rules {
		// Check if this rule contains all the matched segments
		ruleSegmentKeys := make(map[string]bool)
		for k := range rule.Segments {
			ruleSegmentKeys[k] = true
		}

		allSegmentsInRule := true
		for _, sk := range segmentKeys {
			if !ruleSegmentKeys[sk] {
				allSegmentsInRule = false
				break
			}
		}

		if allSegmentsInRule {
			// Found the matching rule, return its operator
			switch rule.SegmentOperator {
			case flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:
				return "ANY", nil
			case flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:
				return "ALL", nil
			}
			break
		}
	}

	return "", nil
}

// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.

# Join them to form bytes
data = bytes.fromhex(''.join(hex_list))
print("Descriptor data decoded:")
print(data)

# Now let's see the pattern for flag_key
# 0x19 = 25 bytes (length of "VariantEvaluationResponse")
# 0x12 = tag (field 2, wire type 2 = length-delimited)
# 0x19 = field number 3, 0x0a = field name "flag_key" 
# Field tag format: (field_number << 3) | wire_type
# For field 9 (flag_key): (9 << 3) | 2 = 72 | 2 = 74 = 0x4a
# For field 10 (segment_match_type): (10 << 3) | 2 = 80 | 2 = 82 = 0x52

print("\nField tag for flag_key (field 9):", hex((9 << 3) | 2))
print("Field tag for segment_match_type (field 10):", hex((10 << 3) | 2))

EOF

import json

# We'll read the file in chunks using the Sourcegraph API info we already have
# Then assemble it with modifications

# Let me create the output by reading from Sourcegraph in chunks
output_lines = []

# Based on what we know from the reads:

# Lines 1000-1800: Middle section
# Lines 1800-1930: Descriptor section
# Lines 1930+: Rest

# I'll manually construct the key sections based on the reads we did:

# The struct definition (lines 819-833)
struct_original = """type VariantEvaluationResponse struct {
\tstate         protoimpl.MessageState
\tsizeCache     protoimpl.SizeCache
\tunknownFields protoimpl.UnknownFields

\tMatch                 bool                   `protobuf:"varint,1,opt,name=match,proto3" json:"match,omitempty"`
\tSegmentKeys           []string               `protobuf:"bytes,2,rep,name=segment_keys,json=segmentKeys,proto3" json:"segment_keys,omitempty"`
\tReason                EvaluationReason       `protobuf:"varint,3,opt,name=reason,proto3,enum=flipt.evaluation.EvaluationReason" json:"reason,omitempty"`
\tVariantKey            string                 `protobuf:"bytes,4,opt,name=variant_key,json=variantKey,proto3" json:"variant_key,omitempty"`
\tVariantAttachment     string                 `protobuf:"bytes,5,opt,name=variant_attachment,json=variantAttachment,proto3" json:"variant_attachment,omitempty"`
\tRequestId             string                 `protobuf:"bytes,6,opt,name=request_id,json=requestId,proto3" json:"request_id,omitempty"`
\tRequestDurationMillis float64                `protobuf:"fixed64,7,opt,name=request_duration_millis,json=requestDurationMillis,proto3" json:"request_duration_millis,omitempty"`
\tTimestamp             *timestamppb.Timestamp `protobuf:"bytes,8,opt,name=timestamp,proto3" json:"timestamp,omitempty"`
\tFlagKey               string                 `protobuf:"bytes,9,opt,name=flag_key,json=flagKey,proto3" json:"flag_key,omitempty"`
}"""

struct_modified = """type VariantEvaluationResponse struct {
\tstate         protoimpl.MessageState
\tsizeCache     protoimpl.SizeCache
\tunknownFields protoimpl.UnknownFields

\tMatch                 bool                   `protobuf:"varint,1,opt,name=match,proto3" json:"match,omitempty"`
\tSegmentKeys           []string               `protobuf:"bytes,2,rep,name=segment_keys,json=segmentKeys,proto3" json:"segment_keys,omitempty"`
\tReason                EvaluationReason       `protobuf:"varint,3,opt,name=reason,proto3,enum=flipt.evaluation.EvaluationReason" json:"reason,omitempty"`
\tVariantKey            string                 `protobuf:"bytes,4,opt,name=variant_key,json=variantKey,proto3" json:"variant_key,omitempty"`
\tVariantAttachment     string                 `protobuf:"bytes,5,opt,name=variant_attachment,json=variantAttachment,proto3" json:"variant_attachment,omitempty"`
\tRequestId             string                 `protobuf:"bytes,6,opt,name=request_id,json=requestId,proto3" json:"request_id,omitempty"`
\tRequestDurationMillis float64                `protobuf:"fixed64,7,opt,name=request_duration_millis,json=requestDurationMillis,proto3" json:"request_duration_millis,omitempty"`
\tTimestamp             *timestamppb.Timestamp `protobuf:"bytes,8,opt,name=timestamp,proto3" json:"timestamp,omitempty"`
\tFlagKey               string                 `protobuf:"bytes,9,opt,name=flag_key,json=flagKey,proto3" json:"flag_key,omitempty"`
\tSegmentMatchType      string                 `protobuf:"bytes,10,opt,name=segment_match_type,json=segmentMatchType,proto3" json:"segment_match_type,omitempty"`
}"""

print("Struct modification:")
print("OLD (lines 819-833):")
print(struct_original)
print("\nNEW (lines 819-834):")
print(struct_modified)

# The new method to add
new_method = """func (x *VariantEvaluationResponse) GetSegmentMatchType() string {
\tif x != nil {
\t\treturn x.SegmentMatchType
\t}
\treturn ""
}"""

# Descriptor modifications

\t0x6d, 0x65, 0x6e, 0x74, 0x4d, 0x61, 0x74, 0x63, 0x68, 0x54, 0x79, 0x70, 0x65,"""
